name: Rocket Lab USA, Inc.
description: Rocket Lab USA, Inc. is an end-to-end space company that provides launch services and space systems solutions for the space and defense industries. Founded in 2006, the company is best known for its Electron orbital launch vehicle, a small-satellite launcher that has established Rocket Lab as a leader in the dedicated small-satellite launch market. Beyond launch, Rocket Lab designs and manufactures complete spacecraft, satellite components, and flight software. The company operates launch sites in New Zealand and the United States, supporting a wide range of missions for government and commercial customers.
